{{Quote|Let the Authority look for me; this whole part of Duroon's spotted with hot springs, thermal vents, heavy-metal magma seepages, and radiation anomalies. It'd take them a month to find me, and in an hour or three, I’ll be gone like a cool breeze.|Han Solo's thoughts on the Corporate Sector Authority|<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" />}}
'''Duroon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] visited by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Pass, nothing—that thing's a ''slot''! Hold your breath, Chewie; we'll have to skin through.|Han Solo, to Chewbacca on a mountain pass|<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" />}}
Duroon<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" /> was a world of lush [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] between [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] vents and fissures,<ref name="CSWE" /> with an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] capable of supporting [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] life without [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]],<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" /> which gave the world gray skies.<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The planet was damp and warm, and had a thin crust that yielded impressive deposits of [[Diamond/Legends|diamonds]], [[glow-pearl]]s, [[fire node]]s, and [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]].<ref name="TEA" /> A volcanically-active crevasse ran east-to-west, appearing like a stupendous scar on the planet's surface and containing active rifts of lava and eddied volcanic flatlands. Its fissure was filled with ferrous slag, infernal heat, and radioactive discord that could confound [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]]. To the seam's south-western end was a gigantic [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] range with a pass leading to a thick jungle beyond. Hot and humid, the jungle was filled with rolling fog and [[Fern-tree|fern-like plants]], and its nocturnal life-forms included lacy white flyers, straw-like creatures, and the<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" /> [[Ball creature of Duroon|Ball Creatures of Duroon]]<ref name="A Guide to the SW Universe" /> referred to as bouncebeasts, which became popular pets on many worlds<ref name="CSWE" /> and were used by Duroon's inhabitants as guard animals.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref> A winding river led from a two-hundred [[Meter/Legends|meter]] waterfall. This area of Duroon was spotted with hot springs and thermal vents.<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" />

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], a [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] which had died of [[Disease/Legends|disease]] was pulled above ground to have its stomach searched for any antiquities.<ref name="A Sarlacc's Stomach" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet was located within [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] space.<ref name="TEA" />

The planet was governed by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority (CSA)]] and was located well within "steer clear territory". As such the [[Sector Police]] did not take well to the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler's]] illegal activities in the system. The Authority made use of contract-slaves from offworld,<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" /> bringing in laborers from [[Montitia]] and [[Pal Goral]] for the dangerous, primitive work of recovering mineral deposits from the planet's crust. Kept in near-slavery, the [[Palarian]]s fought back to wage a [[Palarian slave revolt|guerrilla war]] against the CSA.<ref name="TEA" />

The planet held a single major [[Unidentified Corporate Sector Authority installation|Corporate Sector Authority military installation]]. While making a cargo run, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] attempted to evade the Authority's sensors by flying over a huge, active volcanic fissure located on the opposite side of the planet. Solo also made use of the planet's mountainous terrain to escape when pursued by a heavily-armed CSA<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" /> [[Etti Lighter]].<ref name="HSATCS Sourcebook">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref> He delivered weapons to<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" /> Palarian<ref name="TEA" /> contract-slaves for their slaves' revolt against the CSA.<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End" />
